transcript: Speaker A: Mee Andariki telusa... mundu English nerchukodam inta easy kadu ani? Mundu English nerchukovali ante... costly classes, pedda pedda books, grammar rules... mari andari mundu matladali ante bayam. Manam andariki oka time lo ila feel ayyi untundi... sentence proper ga raledu. English lo simple ga maatladey ki try chesanu. Ala ne anpistundi, nenu enduku baaga mataladalanu ani? Kani ippudu English nerchukodam chala easy ayyindi. Nenu cheptha yela ani... SpeakX app. Ee app lo miru AI teacher tho roju English maatlaadadam practice cheyyachu. Bas! phone theesi, AI teacher tho maatlaadandi... appudu mee English slow ga kani solid ga improve avuthundi. Nenu alane naa English improve chesanu... naa confidence kuda build ayyindi. Mee English mimmalni hold back chestunte... okasari SpeakX try chesi chudandi. [Speaker A: Did you all know... that learning English wasn't this easy before? Before, if you wanted to learn English... costly classes, big books, grammar rules... and fear of speaking in front of everyone. We all must have felt this way at some point... the sentence didn't come out properly. I tried to speak simply in English. It feels like, why can't I speak well? But now, learning English has become very easy. I will tell you how... SpeakX app. In this app, you can practice speaking English daily with an AI teacher. Just take out your phone and talk to the AI teacher... then your English will improve slowly but solidly. I improved my English the same way... my confidence also built up. If your English is holding you back... try the SpeakX app once.]
on_screen_text:
Mee Andariki telusa... [Did you all know...]
mundu English nerchukodam inta easy kadu ani? [that learning English wasn't this easy before?]
Mundu English nerchukovali ante... [Before, if you wanted to learn English...]
costly classes, pedda pedda books, grammar rules... [costly classes, big books, grammar rules...]
andari mundu matladali ante bayam. [fear of speaking in front of everyone.]
mana andariki oka time lo ila feel ayyi untundi... [we all must have felt this way at some point...]
sentence proper ga raledu. [the sentence didn't come out properly.]
English lo simple ga maatladey ki try chesanu [I tried to speak simply in English]
Nenu enduku baaga mataladalanu ani? [Why can't I speak well?]
Kani ippudu English nerchukodam chala easy ayyindi. [But now, learning English has become very easy.]
Nenu cheptha yela ani... [I will tell you how...]
SpeakX app. [SpeakX app.]
Ee app lo miru AI teacher tho roju English maatlaadadam practice cheyyachu. [In this app, you can practice speaking English daily with an AI teacher.]
Bas! phone theesi, AI teacher tho maatlaadandi... [Just take out your phone and talk to the AI teacher...]
appudu mee English slow ga kani solid ga improve avuthundi. [then your English will improve slowly but solidly.]
Nenu alane naa English improve chesanu... [I improved my English the same way...]
naa confidence kuda build ayyindi. [my confidence also built up.]
Mee English mimmalni hold back chestunte... okasari SpeakX try chesi chudandi. [If your English is holding you back... try the SpeakX app once.]
summary: The presenter shares his past struggles with learning English, highlighting the fear of speaking in public and the complexity of traditional methods. He introduces the SpeakX app as a simple solution that allows users to practice daily with an AI teacher. He encourages viewers to try the app to build confidence and improve their English skills.
